title: Mischarytera bullata
taxonomy: Mischarytera bullata is classified within the family Rutaceae. This family is commonly known as the citrus family or rue family, comprising flowering plants such as citrus trees, rue, and others. Mischarytera bullata is native to Australia, and its classification also places it within the genus Mischarytera, which is a part of the Rutaceae family. The genus Mischarytera is endemic to Australia, consisting of small shrubs with tiny flowers. Further classification of Mischarytera bullata is at the species level within the Rutaceae family.
